prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: character portrait. Story world: The Harvest Men. Premise: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight.. Setting: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Threat presence: The Reaper Steward. Recurring motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Character portrait for Visiting Agronomist Dina Crowe, role HANDLER. Traits: guarded, analytical. Response style: accusation=Defensive and selective.; threat=Withdraws and delays.; questioning=Provides partial truths first... Subgenre: folk horror. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Immediate scene brief: The Harvest Men - Visiting Agronomist Dina Crowe Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
